Why Teivaka Exists

From the founder.

I left a Science Degree and farmed for seven years in Korovou and Kadavu — long enough to learn what every Fijian farmer carries but no one says out loud.

Generations of Fijian families have been trapped in subsistence farming. Not because the land is poor. Not because farmers don't work. Because the knowledge has been passed down by memory — most of it wrong — and the system to lift a farm from subsistence into commercial has never existed for us.

Teivaka is what closes that gap.

If that resonates with where you're at — message Cody directly.

— Uraia Koroi Kama, Founder
About Teivaka

A Fiji company redefining farming as a business, not a risk.

Teivaka PTE LTD is a Fiji agricultural company. We activate idle customary land, equip Fijian farmers with proven, field-tested systems, and build resilient, profitable farm businesses that deliver predictable income.

We don't just advise — we operate. Our own farms generate real revenue today. That is what earns us the right to turn the system into software for every Pacific smallholder: the knowledge in our platform is proven in the field, not theorised.

The long-term work is a verifiable production and credit record for the Pacific smallholder — so a farmer long told that technology and finance weren't built for them finally has both, and can prove it to a bank.

Proof, Not Promises

EntityTeivaka PTE LTD · Fiji
Operating farmsKorovou · Kadavu
RevenueBanked, not projected

TISLive on WhatsApp today
VerificationPublic endpoint — in build
— The Problem We Exist To Solve —
Fact A
Only ~4% of Fiji is arable land — less than a third of the world average.
— World Bank / FAO
AND YET
Fact B
~30% of farmland sits idle while Fiji imports over FJD 800M of food a year.
— iTaukei Land Trust Board
The little good land Fiji has is wasted — while the country pays foreigners for food it could grow itself. Teivaka exists to close that gap.
What We Do

Teivaka is one company. TFOS is the one platform we built.

Teivaka PTE LTD is the Fiji agricultural company. TFOS — the Teivaka Farm Operating System — is the platform we built to scale the method: four pillars, one farmer login, every Fijian farmer welcome.

Farmers use Teivaka daily to log what actually happens on their farm — the harvest, the irrigation, the chemical application, the cash sale, the worker hours, the goat that died. Each event is anchored to farm, block, crop, and operator. Each is chained into a verified record that cannot be altered after the fact.

The Company

Teivaka PTE LTD

A Fiji-registered agricultural company (2025), 100% Fijian-owned and Fijian-led, operating in Korovou and Kadavu. The mission: generate wealth from idle land.

The Platform

TFOS — Farm Operating System

Four pillars — Community, Farm Mgmt, Classroom and TIS — across seven verticals, on four tiers from Free to Custom. One farmer login reaches all four.

TIS — The Live Pillar of TFOS

Every Fijian farmer already uses WhatsApp. Now TFOS runs there too.

TIS is the intelligence pillar of TFOS — turning Fiji's field-tested production systems into operational guidance, in the farmer's language, on the channel they already use, working today.

What it is

Localized field intelligence

Field-tested crop, livestock and aquaculture systems — encoded for Fiji's actual growing conditions and delivered as operational guidance: what to plant, when, how, and what it should yield. In English, Bauan Fijian or Hindi.

Why it scales

Zero adoption friction

No app. No login. No dashboard. No digital-literacy barrier. TIS runs inside the channel every Fijian farmer already lives in — so reach is national from day one, not gated behind years of behaviour change. This is the reason it works where agtech adoption usually dies.

Where it's going

Deepening into field intelligence

Fiji's production knowledge is being encoded crop by crop, condition by condition — with farm-specific memory and proactive guidance next: flagging risk, timing decisions, and lifting yield, quality and margin before losses occur. Built and verified phase by phase.

We don't talk — we operate.

Real land. Real revenue. Earned before the platform.

The Platform — TFOS

TFOS — one platform, four pillars, built to scale nationally.

The architecture being built — honest status on each.

Pillar 01 · TFOS

Community

In build

Direct coordination between farmers and the people who pay them — confirmed buyers, exporters, banks. Removes the middleman from the margin.

Explore Community
Pillar 02 · TFOS

Farm Mgmt

In build

The execution and record layer — every task, input, harvest and sale logged across seven verticals: Crops, Horticulture, Livestock, Aquaculture, Forestry, Floriculture and Protected Agriculture. Turns the proven Teivaka method into bank-grade evidence.

Explore Farm Mgmt
Pillar 03 · TFOS

Classroom

In build

Fiji's field-tested production knowledge — crop guides and practical training drawn from real Kadavu and Korovou results, not textbooks.

Explore Classroom
Pillar 04 · TFOS

TIS

Live · WhatsApp

Fiji's field-tested production systems, encoded and delivered as operational guidance on WhatsApp. Working today.

Explore TIS

How It Works

The system we run by hand — proven, then scaled.

Step 01

Assess & Plan

Soil, climate and market read into a custom crop plan. No generic advice.

Step 02

Activate & Execute

Idle land cleared, planted and maintained — the replicable Teivaka method.

Step 03

Sell Direct

To confirmed buyers — Nayans, supermarkets, markets. No middleman dependency.

Step 04

Mentor & Scale

TIS advises on WhatsApp; the platform scales the system to every farmer.

The Inefficiency

Seven structural losses bleeding value out of Fijian agriculture.

Each is measured, not assumed — and each maps to a TFOS pillar built to close it.

#
Where the money is lost today
TFOS pillar that closes it
01
Farmers operate without field-tested production systems — driving lower yields, inconsistent quality, preventable losses and thin margins
TIS
02
No planting aligned to the wet-season import window — the highest-price gap in the calendar goes unworked
Classroom
03
26–28% of every harvest is lost before it reaches a buyer (peer-reviewed)
Farm Mgmt
04
Kava moves to export with no quality record — value left on the table at the point of sale
Farm Mgmt
05
Productive land sits idle with no verifiable record to unlock financing
Farm Mgmt
06
Farmers sell blind — no live price signal, so produce clears below its market value
Community
07
Hotels import produce grown on the next farm over — local supply and confirmed demand never connect
Community
Our Impact

Reducing imports. Employing rural Fiji. Activating idle land.

Teivaka's work is squarely the mission of resilient, domestic Fijian agriculture.

Domestic Production

Idle land activated grows food Fiji currently imports — directly cutting the FJD 800M+ import bill.

Rural Employment

Every activated farm employs local Fijians on land that was earning nothing — jobs where they're needed most.

Gender Inclusion

Women hold core operating and finance roles, and the model is built to bring more women into farm enterprise.

Replicable Model

Proven in Kadavu and Korovou, designed to replicate across Fiji and the wider Pacific smallholder base.

Work With Teivaka

However you reach us, there's a path.

Landowners

Have land sitting idle? Teivaka can activate it through a profit-share partnership — we bring the system, you keep ownership, we share what it earns.

Talk to us about your land →

Buyers

Supermarkets, hotels and exporters: we supply reliably from farms we operate to a consistent standard. A dependable local supply, not a one-off.

Discuss supply →

Institutions & Partners

NGOs, agribusinesses, government and development partners: Teivaka's model and TIS scale via per-farmer partnerships for outgrower networks.

Explore partnership →
